title: The IoT Optimization Cycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the driving forces behind IoT optimization, the areas it impacts, and the resulting benefits, creating a continuous improvement cycle.
elements: Challenges & Drivers (e.g., Limited Resources, Scale, Data Overload)
Optimization Actions (e.g., Algorithm Efficiency, Network Management, Data Filtering)
Key Areas of Impact (e.g., Device Battery, Network Bandwidth, Computational Power)
Achieved Benefits (e.g., Extended Lifespan, Lower Latency, Reduced Cost)
relationships: Challenges create a 'Need for Optimization', which is addressed through specific 'Actions Applied To' Key Areas, ultimately 'Resulting In' tangible Benefits that mitigate the original challenges.
